name: PLC's Plus International
description: PLCs, HMI and SCADA programming company serving California-based businesses regardless of project size

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Delivered on time and on budget. We're very happy to have PLCs Plus as our partner.
Fast, efficient, and provided exceptional service. I would definitely work with them again.
After eight years of partnership, I can attest to the level of service quality they offered.
The only Contractor Manager that really delivered for me and built a strong client relationship.

sentiment.summary: PLCs Plus International has an exceptional reputation with consistently positive testimonials across multiple industries, praised for technical expertise, reliability, client relationships, and delivering projects on schedule and budget.

name: SCADA Integrations

name: Trimark
description: SCADA planning and control systems consulting firm providing expert guidance to improve project reliability and performance

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: That's key to making renewable energy stable, reliable, and viable – which is how we'll save the world.
My role is to help customers gain peace of mind and operate confidently in accomplishing their mission.
Our control solution allows PV and BESS resources to safely connect to the grid, protect their expensive equipment
Answers most user's questions right on the spot.

sentiment.summary: Trimark is portrayed as a mission-driven, solutions-focused company where employees are deeply committed to customer success and enabling reliable renewable energy infrastructure.
